mapper.select:
SELECT id, code, name, code_path, name_path, parent_id, type, level, end_level
FROM base_block WHERE code = #{code}

SELECT id, code, name, code_path, name_path, parent_id, type, level, end_level
FROM base_block WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, code, name, code_path, name_path, parent_id, type, level, end_level
FROM base_block

SELECT *
FROM base_block
WHERE end_level = 1 and (type = 2 or type = 4)

SELECT
id, code, name, code_path, name_path, parent_id, type, level, end_level
FROM base_block
code IN
#{code}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO base_block
( code, name, code_path, name_path, parent_id, type, level, end_level, trade_date, open, high, low, close, prev_close, volume, amount, range_pct, change_pct, change_price, turnover_pct, kline_his, kline_his_raw_len, ext_data_his, ext_data_his_raw_len )
VALUES
( #{item.code}, #{item.name}, #{item.codePath}, #{item.namePath}, IFNULL(#{item.parentId}, 0), IFNULL(#{item.type}, 0), IFNULL(#{item.level}, 0), IFNULL(#{item.endLevel}, 0), #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.open}, #{item.high}, #{item.low}, #{item.close}, #{item.prevClose}, #{item.volume}, #{item.amount}, #{item.rangePct}, #{item.changePct}, #{item.changePrice}, #{item.turnoverPct}, #{item.klineHis}, #{item.klineHisRawLen}, #{item.extDataHis}, #{item.extDataHisRawLen} )

INSERT INTO base_block
( code, name, code_path, name_path, parent_id, type, level, end_level, trade_date,open, high, low, close, prev_close, volume, amount, range_pct, change_pct, change_price, turnover_pct, kline_his, kline_his_raw_len, ext_data_his, ext_data_his_raw_len )
VALUES
( #{item.code}, #{item.name}, #{item.codePath}, #{item.namePath}, IFNULL(#{item.parentId}, 0), IFNULL(#{item.type}, 0), IFNULL(#{item.level}, 0), IFNULL(#{item.endLevel}, 0), #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.open}, #{item.high}, #{item.low}, #{item.close}, #{item.prevClose}, #{item.volume}, #{item.amount}, #{item.rangePct}, #{item.changePct}, #{item.changePrice}, #{item.turnoverPct}, #{item.klineHis}, #{item.klineHisRawLen}, #{item.extDataHis}, #{item.extDataHisRawLen} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
-- 下面使用 COALESCE(VALUES(col), col) ：当传入值为 NULL 时保留原值 name = COALESCE(VALUES(name), name), code_path = COALESCE(VALUES(code_path), code_path), name_path = COALESCE(VALUES(name_path), name_path), parent_id = COALESCE(VALUES(parent_id), parent_id), type = COALESCE(VALUES(type), type), level = COALESCE(VALUES(level), level), end_level = COALESCE(VALUES(end_level), end_level),
trade_date = COALESCE(VALUES(trade_date), trade_date), open = COALESCE(VALUES(open), open), high = COALESCE(VALUES(high), high), low = COALESCE(VALUES(low), low), close = COALESCE(VALUES(close), close), prev_close = COALESCE(VALUES(prev_close), prev_close),
volume = COALESCE(VALUES(volume), volume), amount = COALESCE(VALUES(amount), amount),
range_pct = COALESCE(VALUES(range_pct), range_pct), change_pct = COALESCE(VALUES(change_pct), change_pct), change_price = COALESCE(VALUES(change_price), change_price), turnover_pct = COALESCE(VALUES(turnover_pct), turnover_pct),
kline_his = COALESCE(VALUES(kline_his), kline_his), kline_his_raw_len = COALESCE(VALUES(kline_his_raw_len), kline_his_raw_len), ext_data_his = COALESCE(VALUES(ext_data_his), ext_data_his), ext_data_his_raw_len = COALESCE(VALUES(ext_data_his_raw_len), ext_data_his_raw_len)
